name: feedback-bad-kind
_note: Public. Deterministic validation rejection: kind 'x' is not in @IsIn(['bug','feature']). description + source are valid here so ONLY the kind constraint trips, yielding 400 { error:'kind must be one of the following values: bug, feature', code:'invalid-input', request_id:<uuid> }. The per-request request_id is a fresh UUID (ignored); error + code are byte-stable. Runs in the ValidationPipe BEFORE the honeypot and before any DB access — no shadow-DB prerequisite, mutates nothing.
